english: How can I help you today?
kreyol: Kijan mwen ka ede w jodi a?

english: The birch canoe slid on the smooth planks.
kreyol: Kannot bwa a glise sou planch lis yo.

english: Where does it hurt?
kreyol: Ki kote li fè w mal?

english: Glue the sheet to the dark blue background.
kreyol: Kole fèy la sou bafon ble fonse a.

english: On a scale from 1 to 10, how bad is the pain?
kreyol: Sou yon echèl 1 a 10, ki jan doulè a mal?

english: It's easy to tell the depth of a well.
kreyol: Li fasil pou konnen pwofondè yon pi.

english: Are you allergic to any medications?
kreyol: Èske ou fè alèji ak nenpòt medikaman?

english: These days a chicken leg is a rare dish.
kreyol: Jou sa yo yon pye poul se yon asyèt ra.

english: Take a deep breath in, and let it out.
kreyol: Pran yon gwo souf, epi lage li.

english: Rice is often served in round bowls.
kreyol: Yo souvan sèvi diri nan bòl won.

english: I need to check your blood pressure.
kreyol: Mwen bezwen tcheke tansyon w.

english: The juice of lemons makes fine punch.
kreyol: Ji sitwon fè bon kleren.

english: Are you currently taking any prescription medications?
kreyol: Èske w ap pran okenn medikaman preskri kounye a?

english: A large size in stockings is hard to sell.
kreyol: Yon gwo gwosè nan chosèt difisil pou vann.

english: When did your symptoms start?
kreyol: Ki lè sentòm ou yo te kòmanse?

english: The boy was there when the sun rose.
kreyol: Ti gason an te la lè solèy la te leve.

english: Please lie down on the examination table.
kreyol: Tanpri kouche sou tab ekzamen an.

english: A rod is used to catch pink salmon.
kreyol: Yo itilize yon ralonj pou kenbe somon woz.

english: We need to draw some blood for testing.
kreyol: Nou bezwen pran yon ti san pou tès.

english: The source of the huge river is the clear spring.
kreyol: Sous gwo larivyè a se pye sous dlo klè a.
